name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Applied AI Engineer
summary: Applied AI engineer focused on LLM product integration, evaluation, serving, and production-grade data workflows.

bullets: Built LLM-backed product features with retrieval, prompt iteration, and evaluation loops tied to user-facing KPIs.
Implemented model serving APIs and experiment scaffolding for prompt and model version comparisons.
Worked with product teams to translate ambiguous AI requirements into measurable service behavior.
Operated inference services and offline evaluation jobs for ranking and recommendation systems.
Improved experiment reproducibility with dataset versioning and baseline tracking workflows.

projects.name: LLM Support Assistant
projects.subtitle: RAG and evaluation workflow
bullets: Built a retrieval-augmented support assistant with citation checks and failure-case review workflows.
Defined offline evaluation slices and regression checks for prompt and model updates.
